channel.title: Home on Povaka
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Povaka

item.title: Technology Transfer
item.description: Knowledge diffusion across firms, industries, and countries

item.title: On TRIPS-Plus Standards: What Bilateral Agreements Actually Do
item.description: A brief note on how TRIPS-plus provisions in PTAs differ from the baseline WTO framework, and why it matters for technology transfer.

item.title: Intellectual Property Protection
item.description:
Intellectual Property Protection

Research Overview

Intellectual property institutions influence innovation incentives, market competition, and technology diffusion.

This research area explores how legal protection mechanisms affect economic outcomes and innovation performance.

Core Questions

  • Does stronger intellectual property protection stimulate innovation?

  • How does judicial enforcement influence firm behavior?

  • What is the relationship between patents and technology transfer?

  • How should intellectual property systems balance innovation and access?

Research Topics

Patent Protection

Examining patent systems and innovation incentives.

item.title: International Trade
item.description:
International Trade

Research Overview

International trade facilitates economic growth, technological progress, and industrial transformation.

My research interests focus on the interaction between trade, innovation, and institutional environments.

Core Questions

  • How does trade affect technological upgrading?

  • What role do institutions play in trade performance?

  • How does innovation influence comparative advantage?

  • How do global value chains facilitate technology diffusion?

Research Topics

Trade and Innovation

Studying the relationship between openness and innovation.

Global Value Chains

Analyzing production fragmentation and knowledge spillovers.

item.title: Law & Economics
item.description:
Law & Economics

Research Overview

Law & Economics applies economic reasoning to legal institutions and public policy.

My interests focus on understanding how legal rules shape incentives, behavior, and economic performance.

Core Questions

  • How do institutions affect economic development?

  • What legal arrangements promote innovation?

  • How can economic analysis improve legal design?

  • What role do courts play in market efficiency?

Research Topics

Institutional Economics

Examining institutions as determinants of economic performance.

item.title: Acemoglu (2002)
item.description:
Bibliographic Information

Acemoglu, D. (2002).

Technical Change, Inequality, and the Labor Market.

Keywords

Innovation

Technology

Growth

Summary

Main arguments of the paper.

Methodology

Research design and empirical strategy.

My Notes

Personal reflections and research implications.

item.title: Citation Style
item.description:
Citation Style

Journal Article

Author. (Year).

Title.

Journal.

Volume(Issue), Pages.

Example:

Acemoglu, D. (2002).

Technical Change, Inequality, and the Labor Market.

Journal of Economic Literature, 40(1), 7–72.

Book

Author. (Year).

Title.

Publisher.

Example:

North, D. C. (1990).

Institutions, Institutional Change and Economic Performance.

Cambridge University Press.

item.title: Innovation and Economic Growth
item.description: Examining how innovation incentives shape long-run economic growth.

item.title: Intellectual Property and Technology Transfer
item.description: Study on how intellectual property regimes affect technology diffusion and innovation incentives.

item.title: International Trade Law and Innovation
item.description: Examining how legal frameworks influence innovation and technological development in international trade.

item.title: Povaka Research Platform
item.description: Building an integrated academic platform for managing research projects, publications, and knowledge resources.
